Uses of Package
com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.service

Packages that use com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.service
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.config
 
com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source
 
com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.service
 
com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.web
 
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.service used by com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.config
    Class
    Description
    DashboardConfigService
    Builds the configuration view: one ConfigEntry per @Failover point discovered by the FailoverScanner, enriched with the global framework settings.
    DashboardHistoryService
    Opt-in server-side trend history (design doc §8 option B): a bounded in-memory ring buffer of global counter snapshots, sampled on a fixed schedule.
    DashboardMetricsService
    Dashboard-level wrapper around FailoverMetricsSnapshotService that adds health classification using the configured DashboardProperties.Health thresholds.
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.service used by com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source
    Class
    Description
    DashboardHistoryService
    Opt-in server-side trend history (design doc §8 option B): a bounded in-memory ring buffer of global counter snapshots, sampled on a fixed schedule.
    DashboardMetricsService
    Dashboard-level wrapper around FailoverMetricsSnapshotService that adds health classification using the configured DashboardProperties.Health thresholds.
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.service used by com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.service
    Class
    Description
    DashboardMetricsService
    Dashboard-level wrapper around FailoverMetricsSnapshotService that adds health classification using the configured DashboardProperties.Health thresholds.

    Builds the configuration view: one ConfigEntry per @Failover point discovered by the FailoverScanner, enriched with the global framework settings.
